name: claude-code-orchestrate
description: Multi-model orchestration skill for Claude Code — lead model orchestrates Opus/Sonnet/Haiku subagents plus a cross-vendor Codex peer

plugins.name: orchestrate
plugins.description: Multi-model orchestration: routing table (scout recon, mechanical, reasoning, cross-vendor peer tiers), six-field delegation contracts with dispatch templates, DONE/BLOCKED status vocabulary, budget modes (economic/thorough), escalation ladder, blind-parallel high-stakes path with reconcile rules, and a verification stage. Installs the /orchestrate command and three model-pinned agents (deep-reasoner→Opus, fast-worker→Sonnet, scout→Haiku). Codex peer requires the Codex CLI (degrades gracefully without it).
